text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. Entering this modern, glass-walled space pushes me to consider the boundaries between observer and participant. The environment is clean, organized, almost clinical—in contrast, the vibrant R+D exhibit inside hums with the energy of innovation and inquiry. The juxtaposition of order and creative chaos awakens a reflective mood in me, as if I'm about to embark on an intellectual journey exploring the symbiosis of human and machine. Each detail invites contemplation, and I’m eager to immerse myself fully in this space of thought and discovery.
